name: Roast Grouse with Wild Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 can Con Cream of mushroom soup (10-1/2 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub grouse inside and out with salt.
2. Combine onions, mushrooms, consomme', oregano, and wild rice in a pot. Bring to a boil and simmer until rice is tender, about 40 to 45 minutes, adding water when necessary to keep rice from sticking. Season to taste with salt.
3. Stuff grouse with the cooked rice.
4. Place onion, carrots, and apple in a shallow roasting pan and place grouse on top, breast side down.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F.
6. Roast for 30 minutes.
7. Turn grouse breast side up and roast until brown and tender, about 1-1/2 to 2 hours.
8. Remove grouse to a platter and keep warm.
9. Strain pan juices into a saucepan.
10. Stir in soup, cream, and wine. Simmer, stirring, until the sauce bubbles.
11. Spoon sauce over grouse.
12. Garnish with additional cooked wild rice.
